## Checklist

- [ ] My prompt file is in `prompts/` and named in kebab-case (`my-prompt-title.md`)
- [ ] The file has valid frontmatter (`title` and `difficulty`)
- [ ] `difficulty` is one of: `Easy`, `Medium`, `Hard`, `FML`
- [ ] The prompt includes at least one example with expected output
- [ ] The description is written in my own words
